overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic city environment from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning along a highway sound barrier, passing under an NCART overpass with digital billboards, and concluding with a panoramic view of a waterfront amusement park and construction-filled skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic highway sidewalk between high concrete sound barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk between high concrete walls with the highway visible to the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the highway parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall concrete barrier with blue horizontal stripe running along the left side of the walkway
multi-lane asphalt road with red lane markings visible in the distance
large modern building with curved roof visible beyond the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective walking along a narrow sidewalk enclosed by high concrete sound barriers. The highway runs parallel on the right with occasional futuristic vehicles passing by. The lighting is bright midday sun with clear skies visible above the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to overpass with digital billboards

events.description: camera turns right to face the highway and approaches the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: turning right to face the road and walking toward the overpass entrance

entered.detail: large concrete and steel overpass spanning the highway with support pillars
illuminated advertisement screens mounted on the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to face the highway directly, approaching an overpass with large digital billboards. The concrete sound barrier falls behind as the scene opens up to the full width of the road. Vehicles continue to pass by on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with NCART digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass alongside moving traffic, passing beneath the billboards

notable_agents.action: dark-colored futuristic coupe driving under the overpass

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying NCART branding and advertisements on the overpass
futuristic curved street lamps lining the highway median

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the overpass structure, the lighting becomes slightly diffused. Large NCART digital billboards dominate the right side while futuristic vehicles pass by on the road. The space feels semi-enclosed by the concrete overpass above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with overhead traffic light gantry

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway past the overpass, approaching the traffic light structure

entered.detail: overhead metal framework spanning the road with traffic signals and sensors
tall palm trees lining the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: Having passed the overpass, the camera continues along the open highway toward a traffic light gantry. Palm trees become visible on the right side, and the bright midday sun creates sharp shadows on the asphalt. Vehicles continue to move along the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with amusement park and construction skyline

events.description: camera turns left to reveal the waterfront and city skyline with amusement park rides

agents.ego_description: turning left to face the waterfront and pausing to observe the city skyline and amusement park

entered.detail: calm body of water reflecting the sky and surrounding structures
large red steel roller coaster tracks extending over the water
large Ferris wheel structure part of the waterfront amusement park
multiple tower cranes atop skyscrapers under construction
cluster of high-rise buildings in various stages of construction with exposed frameworks

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to reveal a stunning waterfront view featuring an amusement park with a roller coaster and Ferris wheel extending over the water. Beyond the park, a dense skyline of skyscrapers under heavy construction dominates the horizon, with numerous tower cranes visible against the blue sky. The scene transitions from the highway environment to a scenic waterfront promenade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins within a confined concrete corridor and expands into a panoramic waterfront vista of a futuristic city. It begins by walking along a narrow sidewalk enclosed by high sound barriers under a bright midday sun, with futuristic vehicles passing on the adjacent highway. As the camera turns right, the restrictive walls fall away to reveal the full width of the road, leading the viewer beneath a semi-enclosed overpass dominated by large NCART digital billboards. The scene then opens back up into the sunlight, moving past palm trees and traffic gantries before turning left to shift from the industrial highway environment to a scenic promenade. Finally, the view expands to reveal a waterfront amusement park with a roller coaster and Ferris wheel, set against a dense skyline of skyscrapers and towering construction cranes.
